Explanation:
Reviewing the "back of shirt sponsor" column:
- 2004–2008: no back sponsor.
- 2008–: no back sponsor (with new shirt sponsor Mira Showers).
- 2009–2011: back sponsor appears (PSU Technology Group), and subsequent periods also have back sponsors.

Thus, the last year without a back sponsor is 2008. The Prediction Answer matches this.
